X^32 - X^31*Y + 712*X^31 + 31*X^30*Y + 174220*X^30 - 372*X^29*Y + 15861832*X^29 + 1891*X^28*Y + 
    307499974*X^28 - 31*X^27*Y + 2581114312*X^27 - 41571*X^26*Y + 10638403548*X^26 + 130975*X^25*Y + 
    17936297688*X^25 + 245768*X^24*Y - 15665543007*X^24 - 1863906*X^23*Y - 108862188624*X^23 + 
    513701*X^22*Y - 102329502576*X^22 + 12762049*X^21*Y + 200190428064*X^21 - 14248995*X^20*Y + 
    427199325152*X^20 - 51887118*X^19*Y - 120472951936*X^19 + 86008539*X^18*Y - 835070387392*X^18 + 
    132017220*X^17*Y - 140615738112*X^17 - 285180966*X^16*Y + 1132210581504*X^16 - 202591944*X^15*Y +
    374317756416*X^15 + 591434244*X^14*Y - 1248654176256*X^14 + 145826728*X^13*Y - 386300608512*X^13 
    - 790720162*X^12*Y + 1189851082752*X^12 + 57343056*X^11*Y + 168460582912*X^11 + 668209712*X^10*Y 
    - 951891329024*X^10 - 217998944*X^9*Y + 118406643712*X^9 - 329047392*X^8*Y + 568596496384*X^8 + 
    188170496*X^7*Y - 268384600064*X^7 + 73848448*X^6*Y - 180009304064*X^6 - 72423936*X^5*Y + 
    199033356288*X^5 + 952320*X^4*Y - 28085059584*X^4 + 10856448*X^3*Y - 48368713728*X^3 - 
    2095104*X^2*Y + 33285996544*X^2 - 286720*X*Y - 9395240960*X + Y^2 + 65536*Y + 1073741824
